Every time in my life that I've heard the spirit it's been when my normal (linear) thinking had exasperated & exhausted itself -- reached its end without results, but each time, results were still absolutely necessary. This alone makes a circumstantial case for locating the spirit, the Inward Light, in the right hemisphere (I suppose). Normal habitual cognative processes must be tried fully and fail. What ultimately does this dream teach me? The evolution of the Savior from His two sources, one of which is manifest, the other a crypte morphe. The spirit as "parent" will not determine anything in terms of gender. Also, in the use of a string puppet, the puppeteer is never supposed to be visible, and when we hear his voice we hear only a voice appropriate not to him but to the puppet. The puppeteer speaks through the puppet, who is a mouthpiece, then, for the god, gods or God. Is this not what

The sort of people who Christ hung around with are the same kind (in modern form: e..g. narks & users) that I prefer to hang around with. Gentile, proper, "good" people make me restless & uneasy; I know they won't understand me or accept me as I am - instead they will judge me. It was that latter very respectable group, the pillars of society, who judged & condemned Jesus to death, a dog's death, as degrading as they could make it. Why?

He is recollected but not as someone or some thing past: rather. He is within or below ontologically. It all has to do with time: what it is (if it is anything) & how it funtions. These layers laid down are construed as the past, but in fact are not: and I am in each cylce - reliving it again & again - those cycles are always there for me, not prior to me, not the true past at all but slightly changing versions of the past present, the now. {diagram} Xerox letter Again & again, hence never "past" - The true sense - it is equally future, too, will come again, until I am released. As I was this last time.

How can I construe an event (e.g. the Xerox letter) as someth

How can I construe an event (e.g. the Xerox letter) as something happening in the past when in fact it is also happening now (i.e. in the present) & will (until God intervenes) will again happen in the future? Obviously our [lincon?] concept of time is a false concept.

Of course God could accomplish the same thing by making the apostolic [KH aus?] immortal: the 2nd advent would then occur in this life their lifteimes, but it wouldn't be same, though. & this solution (explanation) doesn't appeal

Yes! Before the fall - before II went wrong. We had two coherent signals, not one healthy one + one sick one. This (state) was man's natural, normal condition - + then Form II "Fell," taking men with it. But the mystery religions (esp early Xtianity, neo-platonism + Gnosticism) know techniques to unscramble the sane (I) signal from the insane (II) + get "back" to it - i.e. into it at the exclusion of II - as I briefly did. This is the summary [cryptus].

What I did appoximates the primordial pre

The road to this is through human creativity, not human thinking (artificer rather than noös), in essence, the causing of something new to arise within the universe. The one is more an artificer that a mind. ZEBRA is a mind; the one creates (makes).

But on an "is-ness" (essence) level the human being discovers that he is higher on the scale that his teacher, ZEBRA, The servant will again become the servant + the master (man) the master (God).

[Diagram]

(A) man unaware of ZEBRA + human its ser

(B) man aware of ZEBRA + its friend or equal

(C) man nearing his isomorphism to the one + hence superior to his teacher ZEBRA

[/Diagram]

In state (A) man is unaware of the ZEBRA component in his reality + that ZEBRA is his tutor, in (B) man is conscious of ZEBRA as equal. In (C), the goal, man shows flashes of his isomorphism with the One.
